Bacteria constitute a large domain of microorganisms found in a living body. Bacteria inhabit soil, water, acidic hot springs, radioactive waste, and the deep portions of Earth's crust. Bacteria also live in symbiotic and parasitic relationships with plants and animals. It is the white blood cell's job to neutralize all evil bacteria in its body.

A virus is a small infectious agent inside the living cells of other organisms. Viruses can infect all types of life forms, from animals and plants to microorganisms, including bacteria. In Germ Wars, viruses typically attack the white blood cell by physically hitting and biting it.

Red blood cells, also called erythrocytes, are the most common type of blood cell and the vertebrate organism's principal means of delivering oxygen to the body tissues—via blood flow through the circulatory system. In Germ Wars, their role is that of projectiles, meaning that they can be "launched" into nearby evil germs and deal damage to them.

White blood cells, also called leukocytes or leucocytes, are the cells of the immune system that are involved in protecting the body against both infectious disease and foreign invaders. All white blood cells are produced and derived from multipotent cells in the bone marrow known as hematopoietic stem cells. Leukocytes are found throughout the body, including the blood and lymphatic system. They can be upgraded in order to be more effective at destroying evil germs.

Germ Wars features a collectible in the form of DNA, which gives the white blood cell more DNA points which can in turn be used to further evolve and enhance the white blood cell, making it more effective at destroying evil germs.
Drifters are fairly large microorganisms which harmlessly float aroung the body and spawn various germs. They can also heal nearby microorganisms, including the white blood cell.

Main hero of the game: Bends, hovers, likes energy, the usual stuff. 
Lives in the robot village, seems to have unnatural resistance to computer viruses.
Often seen as a third wheel, even though doesn't even have wheels or two legs for that matter. But it  doesn't matter: Trianglebot is one of the most durable and skilled bots out there.
Bullous, spherical, circular, you name it, this bot is exactly that: a round ball like creature. Comes in blazing hot red, with a cool racing stripe!
Ancient technology, plays music and speech from little casettes. You could carry almost a full album worth of music with you. Skipping to your favorite track? Forget about it.
These worm like creatures were once used to find rare earth minerals. These days they just home into the things made out of those precious metals: bots. Problematic.

This sharply named bot is one of the earliest models still functional. Very durable, very not clever.
The brute force that gets the square bot into a round hole.
